scripts.dev:
docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.local.yml up -d --remove-orphans && echo '
Start applications with commands:

  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/server run dev
  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/client run dev
  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/server-nestjs run dev

Make sure you provide env variables in `.env` files.'
scripts.docker:ci:build: export $(cat apps/server/.env.docker | grep -v '#' | xargs) && export COMPOSE_FILE=./docker/docker-compose.ci.yml && cd $(dirname $COMPOSE_FILE) && docker buildx bake --allow=fs.read=.. --file $(basename $COMPOSE_FILE) --load && cd - > /dev/null
scripts.docker:e2e: docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up ${TAG:+--no-build} -d --remove-orphans; pnpm playwright:test; docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down --remove-orphans
scripts.docker:integ:build: export $(cat apps/server/.env.integ | grep -v '#' | xargs) && export COMPOSE_FILE=./docker/docker-compose.integ.yml && cd $(dirname $COMPOSE_FILE) && docker buildx bake --allow=fs.read=.. --file $(basename $COMPOSE_FILE) --load && cd - > /dev/null
scripts.integ:
docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.local.yml up -d --remove-orphans postgres pgadmin && echo '
Start server and client with commands:

  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/server run integ
  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/client run integ
  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/server-nestjs run integ

Make sure you provide env variables in `.env.integ` files.'
